title: Running
lyrics: Run, run away, by the way I know I'm running next to you, away from you, oh next to you I'm running away, every time it's dark Disciples in my mind talk, the crimes and then I find I'm running from the thoughts that I have when I think about them Right way, which way am I gonna go? Right way, which way am I coming home? You kicked me out at 18, now if I'm an autistic dream I got no shot yet The addictive drugs, my, making me collapse around the experience Creativity variants, I'm just delirium, inside my hang days thinking I live forever invincible I'm running from the truth, running from the truth All through, all through, I'm running through the ground Can't take care of anyone, can't take care of care Lying to the end of my own despair I bleed out here in my mind, running from the truth My mind, running from people, it's you, me, yeah, you love me I hate that you know you want to run, you want to run But if you stay here trusting someone, someone You will find that we all run, around the bend The circle's wisdom becomes your friend Oh, stop running if you don't want it to be Dark highway, dark stars, dark heart Every time I think it's a dark part Oh, do I remember life? Oh, the people that I love from The hearts from up above, the ones lost beyond us I know it's something I should ache for Be there, ache for me A good memory in the last that I'll see of you I hope you don't run back to me, you're far away I hope you're running from, from me and you And the thoughts of all that we could have Dumb now we're dying inside Now we're all just trying to find a why For why we're here, to mold our lives in the dark Just keep running till there's no time left, there's no time left, there's no time left Then you look back, regret homing in And the world all lies in your face With fake superstitious, fake you Fake ease, no why, nobody heals Just a test of everything inside of you If you don't know you, stop running from you Hey, if it was you, if it was me, if it was you Even if you don't know if it was you If it was you, me or me I bet you, I bet you, I mean it's the same thing as I Water, no, no, no, no, no

lyricsSegments.text: Run, run away, by the way I know I'm running next to you, away from you, oh next to you
I'm running away, every time it's dark Disciples in my mind talk, the crimes and then I find I'm running from the thoughts that I have when I think about them
Right way, which way am I gonna go? Right way, which way am I coming home? You kicked me out at 18, now if I'm an autistic dream I got no shot yet
The addictive drugs, my, making me collapse around the experience Creativity variants, I'm just delirium, inside my hang days thinking I live forever invincible
I'm running from the truth, running from the truth All through, all through, I'm running through the ground Can't take care of anyone, can't take care of care Lying to the end of my own despair
I bleed out here in my mind, running from the truth My mind, running from people, it's you, me, yeah, you love me
I hate that you know you want to run, you want to run But if you stay here trusting someone, someone You will find that we all run, around the bend The circle's wisdom becomes your friend
Oh, stop running if you don't want it to be Dark highway, dark stars, dark heart Every time I think it's a dark part Oh, do I remember life?
Oh, the people that I love from The hearts from up above, the ones lost beyond us I know it's something I should ache for Be there, ache for me
A good memory in the last that I'll see of you I hope you don't run back to me, you're far away I hope you're running from, from me and you And the thoughts of all that we could have

Dumb now we're dying inside Now we're all just trying to find a why For why we're here, to mold our lives in the dark Just keep running till there's no time left, there's no time left, there's no time left

Then you look back, regret homing in And the world all lies in your face With fake superstitious, fake you Fake ease, no why, nobody heals Just a test of everything inside of you If you don't know you, stop running from you
Hey, if it was you, if it was me, if it was you Even if you don't know if it was you If it was you, me or me I bet you, I bet you, I mean it's the same thing as I
Water, no, no, no, no, no
